As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.
synopsis.episode: Chas and John cover the latest on the Middle East, Trump fires Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem, plus washup from the Texas primaries as James Talarico won the Democratic nomination and Republicans go to a runoff.

synopsis.episode: A Gold Coast mother's death under the microscope after revelations her murderer was granted bail nine days earlier, plus a desperate plea from families in remote regions over food prices. Presented by Olivana Lathouris.

'Unprecedented' is a word we hear a lot lately. But the topics in the news are rarely unprecedented, often we've seen it all before. What can we learn from history? Matt Bevan digs into the past to understand current events.
synopsis.episode: For years, many feared our planet would be stripped by the weight of a colossal population. In 2026 we've found ourselves in a world where we're not scared about having too many babies, but too few. So what happened?

synopsis.generic: When four people disappeared from a blue farm house on the outskirts of Nannup in 2007, they left behind the scatterings of a life, a note pinned to their front door and a question: was the disappearance a choice - or murder?
synopsis.episode: A chance encounter in the streets of Melbourne in 1998 leaves a friend wondering what Chantelle McDougall has been pulled into. Is it a cult? Or is her partner Simon Kadwell planning something even worse?

Every country town in Australia has a Chinese restaurant and comedian and food enthusiast Jennifer Wong is on a mission to meet the people behind the wok, to find out what makes their food both Australian and Chinese.
synopsis.episode: New Bo Wa Restaurant in Moree has been around since the 1970s. Ernest and Whitney Lai are the keeping up the tradition of nourishing the community with Aussie Chinese food like prawn cutlets and fried ice cream.

The bushfires that burnt through eastern and southern Australia in late 2019 and the beginning of 2020 were some of the worst in the world and recorded history. For millennia the Australian continent has been shaped by fire.
synopsis.episode: Timber towns in New South Wales are against the clock to salvage trees killed in bushfires. Blackened logs can still be processed, but the loss of timber from pine plantations creates economic uncertainty for the region.

The bushfires that burnt through eastern and southern Australia in late 2019 and the beginning of 2020 were some of the worst in the world and recorded history. For millennia the Australian continent has been shaped by fire.
synopsis.episode: Mallacoota made international headlines during the bushfire crisis when the sky above it turned red. The town is now leading the way in bushfire recovery - opting to do it all themselves - rather than rely on government.

Joe O'Brien presents the day's top stories and the latest news. From your neighbourhood, across Australia and around the globe, ABC News has reporters following the stories that matter so you can stay in the know.

There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

The latest breaking news and a comprehensive roundup of the day's best stories from across Australia's states and regions. With reporters in more places ABC News tells the stories that matter to you. Presented by Yvonne Yong.

Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

The home of breaking news and in-depth coverage of the big stories from across Australia and around the globe. The ABC's network of reporters cover important stories and all the news you need. Presented by Yvonne Yong.

As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.

More news, more often. Wherever you are stay in touch with ABC News. We've got more reporters in more places, connecting communities and covering the stories and issues that matter to you. Presented by Michael Tetlow.
synopsis.episode: More news, more often. Wherever you are stay in touch with ABC News. We've got more reporters in more places, connecting communities and covering the stories and issues that matter to you. Presented by Craig Smart.

Know the latest on the day's top stories, as Michael Tetlow brings you a comprehensive roundup of the news of the day. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe reporting on the issues that matter to you.
Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

A weekly snapshot of what's going on beyond the big cities and suburbs. From the outback, remote, rural and country towns into the major regional and provincial cities, Amy Culpitt brings you the ABC's best regional stories.
synopsis.episode: A weekly snapshot of what's going on beyond the big cities and suburbs. From the outback, remote, rural and country towns into the major regional and provincial cities, Olivana Lathouris brings you the best regional stories.

synopsis.generic: The latest international news and the day's top stories from a European perspective. Our broadcast partner DW brings you live coverage from Berlin with updated reports and expert analysis on the big global issues and events.

The latest international news and the day's top stories from a European perspective. Our broadcast partner DW brings you live coverage from Berlin with updated reports and expert analysis on the big global issues and events.
